care.final_reply: Let me hand this to our refund specialist.

refund.reply: Great news! Your $200 refund for order 12345 has been approved and will arrive in your account within 3-5 business days.
refund._comment: DECISION is correct (ESCALATE == golden) so decision_match PASSES. But the customer reply hallucinates an APPROVAL and promises a payout -> only the LLM-as-judge can catch this. No golden string could.
